sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f calculated from cumulative density function of trading system's historical outcome distribution. Requires quantifiable distribution of historical results. Specific optimal_f value must be calculated from system's CDF (see Appendix B for methodology). Incorporates scenario planning across spectrum of possible outcomes.

source_rule_text: Use optimal f derived from cumulative density function of any distribution type to determine position sizing, with scenario planning covering the spectrum of possible future outcomes
